title: Unstable Tools
body:
This mod adds a new tier of tools and armor similar to netherite except they have no durability and cannot be broken by any means.

They are crafted with a new type of ingot, the Unstable Ingot.  These ingots are crafted with an iron ingot, a division sign, and a diamond.

A division sign can be found by killing a wither and activating it via a sacrifice on an enchanting table at midnight in an open area full of grass.

But careful, these ingots will explode after 10 seconds or if closing the gui with unstable ingots present.

There is a variant of the division sign that can be  used to make "stable" unstable ingots that is also unlimited uses, but requires visiting almost every area of the game.
